scene.message: Elly: Really?{nl} My, hehehehe...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Really?{nl} Is that so, hehehehe...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: The wise stay clear{nl} of danger. Use your head.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Yeah, yeah,{nl} whatever you say.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: You're all so popular,{nl} it must be hard on you.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: You're all such{nl} heartthrobs, it's a handful.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Let's go!{nl} Time won't wait for us!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Heh...{wait_fr:88} Pandora,{wait_fr:60}{nl} was it...{waitkey}{ret}
